items.text: You notice that the burly figure, so eager to leap into battle moments ago, has run off after the fight.

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: Phew. Hello, I'm Kastus. I fought these things from the outskirts all the way here. I'm spent, luckily you two were able to lend me a hand.

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: Yes, I understand. As you can see, the Dark Tide left many monstrosities in the Mournfell Canyon.

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: But where there are challenges, there will always be Gladiators like me who'll come to hone our fighting skills.

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: But I think I might have overestimated my abilities. Your form in combat showed me I have much room for improvement.

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: I've watched your match with contender Lupa so many times that I've memorized every blow. But seeing you fight in person is a real eye-opener.

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: An actual Champion is giving me training advice. Understood, I must start with the fundamentals!

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: Since you're both Gladiators, like me, I bet you're all amazed at the sights here.

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: I only had to deal with the aftermath of the Dark Tide, and that left me exhausted. To think our heroes back then had to face it head-on while also ensuring the survival of Septimont.

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: As a present-day Septimontian, I have nothing but respect and admiration for them.

items.speaker: Kastus
items.text: I hope I can rise to the occasion as a true warrior in times of crisis. I'm sure you feel the same, don't you?

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: I... yes, of course!

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: Well, Champion, it's time to photograph the corruption of the Mournfell Canyon brought on by the Dark Tide. Next, we must stop by the <color=Highlight>Statue of Fabius the Hero</color>.

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: Wow, that's a brilliant shot, I bet you'd also be Champion in any photography contest!

options.text: I'm an expert of all trades.

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: See, that confidence would put anyone's doubts to rest. Let's head off now!

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: I can be your local guide and tell you all about the history of Septimont. I promise won't get bored on your journey.

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: Next stop, <color=Highlight>Border Mountains</color>!

items.speaker: Unknown (50161)
items.text: Just as you're about to follow Postumia, a loud noise snaps from behind. You turn to catch a blurry sight of a burly figure vanishing into the shadows.

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: What's the matter?

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: (This is going to be interesting.)

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: How did this little one end up lost here? I'll take it back home.

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: Champion, you'd know Common Echoes are treasured in Rinascita, but did you know that ever since gladiatorial combat became popular here, they've also become an irreplaceable part of Septimont's history?

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: Woe betide anyone who mistreats them. Anyway, help me snap a picture of Septimont City.

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: Our last stop without question is the <color=Highlight>Colosseum Olymdos</color>!

items.speaker: Postumia
items.text: But first, I need to take Ta-da back to the Village of Respite. Catch you later!
